audit_items.proof_trace: All direct pointer dereferences within ldapmodify.c are guarded: dn->bv_val in domodify is protected by an explicit NULL check at line 469; txn_id is dereferenced at line 292 only after the combined guard at line 280 (rc != LDAP_SUCCESS || !txn_id) ensures txn_id is non-NULL; ber_memalloc results are checked before use; getenv() returns are used as boolean conditionals only. The ld handle can be NULL when dont==1, but ldapmodify.c never directly dereferences ld's contents — it only passes ld to library functions (ldap_get_option handles NULL ld gracefully for session-global options, and the defctrls guard at line 410 prevents further NPD).
